name: FARO baseline fairness audit
scope: This audit verifies that baseline rows are honestly scoped as local references, official-code references, or proxy stress tests.
claim_boundary: MANCE++ is official-code and claim-grade on Waterbirds. Camelyon17 MANCE++ is diagnostic only. SPLINCE/SPLICE, R-LACE, and TaCo remain scoped proxies unless reference receipts are added.

checks.requirement: ERM probe is available under the same frozen representation protocol.
Source-balanced ERM is available where source labels are defined.
Group-reweighted ERM is available where target-source groups are defined.
GroupDRO-style probe is available as the robust linear-probe baseline.
Source-probe projection is labeled as a representation-edit stress test.
INLP-style rows are labeled as style/proxy rows unless reference code is run.
LEACE-style rows are scoped unless exact reference parity is shown.
SPLINCE/SPLICE rows are proxy rows unless reference receipts are added.
R-LACE rows are proxy rows unless reference receipts are added.
TaCo rows are proxy rows unless reference receipts are added.
Camelyon17 MANCE++ is diagnostic only and must not be presented as a full reference row.
FARO selected point and abstention decision are reported separately from baselines.
Tables and prose distinguish proxy stress tests from official reference implementations.
Evidence supports FARO as certified selection/abstention, not universal SOTA erasure.
